title: Dame Shirley Bassey Stops Writing Back to Fans
summary: Dame Shirley Bassey is a famous singer from Wales who is 89 years old. She has been singing for 70 years and has many fans around the world. She used to write back to fans who sent her letters, but now she cannot do that anymore. This is because she needs surgery on her hand, which makes it hard for her to write. She shared this news on Instagram and said she is sorry. She feels happy and honored that people send her letters about their lives and how her music helps them. Dame Shirley started singing when she was young and became a big star, singing songs for James Bond movies. She is a special person in Wales and has received awards for her singing.

background_read: Dame Shirley Bassey is a famous singer from Wales who started singing as a teenager. She became well-known for singing theme songs for James Bond movies and has entertained people for over 70 years. She is loved by fans worldwide and has received honors for her contributions to music. Recently, she announced that due to hand surgery, she can no longer write back to fans who send her letters, which she has done for many years.
Article_Structure: WHO: Dame Shirley Bassey, a Welsh singer
WHAT: She will no longer reply to fan mail due to hand surgery
WHERE: She shared this on Instagram and is from Cardiff, Wales
WHY: Because she needs surgery on her hand, making it difficult to write

perspectives.description: Fans might feel sad that they won't get replies but understand because of her health.
